Author: Ildar Akhmetov
Title: My LLM coding workflow going into 2026 | Ildar Akhmetov
Text:
This is a very, very good and comprehensive overview of using LLMs in software engineering in 2026. A must read. https://lnkd.in/gj5e_eAp Thank you Addy Osmani .
great read! for students learning these new LLM workflows, i built a platform that matches you with internships based on your specific tech stack. helps you find companies that actually value these skills instead of guessing. check it out at https://offerpilotai.com/u/ro339 🚀
I'm honestly a little frustrated with myself for overlooking this for so long! I used to jump straight into implementation, but switching to a 'Planning First' workflow has been a total game-changer. Giving an agent a spec + a plan is the difference between a pretty good result and something impressive.
Liked, saved, shared, reposted… thanks!
